---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, priority:medium
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Brief description of the feature and its value to users.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this solve? What user pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution
High-level approach to implementing this feature.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Specific measurable outcome
- [ ] Specific measurable outcome  
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Ready for self-review

## Technical Considerations
- **Complexity**: Low/Medium/High
- **Dependencies**: List any blocking issues
- **Testing Strategy**: How will this be tested?

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Feature works as described in acceptance criteria
- [ ] All tests pass (including new tests)
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No breaking changes or breaking changes documented
- [ ] PR self-reviewed and ready for merge
